result.stdout:
Cohelion changelog generator, version 1.2.0.0
CS.Changelog.Console 1.6.0+b2be2b57612c8b7a8af1710c07b95ffe1334c6b6
Cohelion 2024

  -n, --releasename            (Default: ) The name

  -g, --pathToGit              (Default: git) Path to git

  --full                       (Default: false) false when only changes since
                               the last release need to be included, true to
                               include all changes.

  -s, --startTag               (Default: ) The starting tag to use when making
                               getting incremental history, overriding option
                               'full'.

  -r, --repositoryDirectory    (Default: ) Path to the repository

  --replace                    (Default: false) Replace the target file, instead
                               of appending.

  -f, --filename               (Default: Changelog) The file to write to, if no
                               file extension is specified, output-specific
                               extension will be added.

  --openfile                   (Default: false) When set, opens the file after
                               the changelog has been generated

  -o, --outputformat           (Default: JSON) The output format, choose
                               between: Console, MarkDown, Html, Json or Xml

  -v, --verbosity              (Default: Debug) The threshold for printing
                               messages to standard output

  --issueformat                (Default: [a-zA-Z]{1,4}-\d{1,4}) Expression for
                               recognizing issue numbers

  --issuetrackerurl            (Default:
                               https://projects.cohelion.com/issue/{0}) Url for
                               recognizing issue numbers. '{0}' will be
                               substituted with issue number

  --repositoryurl              (Default: ) Url for showing commit details, {0}
                               will be substituted by the commit hash.

  --dontlinkifyissuenumbers    (Default: false) Recognized issue numbers will be
                               converted to links when set to false

  --branch_development         (Default: develop) The development branch

  --branch_master              (Default: master) The master branch

  --branch_preview             (Default: preview) The preview branch

  --prefix_hotfix              (Default: hotfix) The prefix of hotfix branches

  --prefix_release             (Default: release) The prefix of release branches

  --prefix_feature             (Default: feature) The prefix of release branches

  --category_feature           (Default: Feature) The display label of the
                               feature category

  --category_hotfix            (Default: Hotfix) The display label of the hotfix
                               category

  --help                       Display this help screen.

  --version                    Display version information.
